title: ASW+NO3 medium
author: Roscoff Culture Collection

steps_raw.instruction: Dissolve 25 g of NaCl in MilliQ water To this solution, add : %s %s Adjust the pH to 8 with concentrated HCl Adjust to 999 mL with milliQ water Add 1 mL of trace metals (see receipe below) Autoclave the medium
Dissolve all these components separately in milliQ water : %s %s Combine the various solutions after full dissolution Make final volume up to 1L with milliQ Store in refrigerator
